pages.text: The Great Work is alchemy's final trial. First prepare the three matrices that unlock higher scroll tiers, then carry Prima Materia through Nigredo, Albedo, Citrinitas, and Rubedo.

pages.title: Salic Matrix
pages.text: Activate an Equation Scroll with sand, then complete a level 4 transformation at polarity 0 or below. Salic Matrix is used to craft Terrestrial scrolls.

pages.title: Mercurial Matrix
pages.text: Transform Salic Matrix at level 8 and polarity 20 or above. Mercurial Matrix is used to craft Lunar scrolls.

pages.title: Sulfuric Matrix
pages.text: Transform Mercurial Matrix at level 13 while polarity lies from -1 to 1. This narrow window demands precise control. Sulfuric Matrix is used to craft Solar scrolls.

pages.title: Prima Materia
pages.text: One Transmutation Crystal and four cobblestone form the starting matter of the four stages.

pages.title: Nigredo · Blackening
pages.text: Transform Prima Materia into Nigredo Matter. Level 3; polarity -50 to -10.$(br2)$(quote)That which is below is like that which is above.$()

pages.title: Albedo · Whitening
pages.text: Transform Nigredo Matter into Albedo Matter. Level 6; polarity 20 to 50. The first stage leaves negative polarity, so the balance must be reversed.$(br2)$(quote)The earth nourished it; the wind carried it.$()

pages.title: Citrinitas · Yellowing
pages.text: Transform Albedo Matter into Citrinitas Matter. Level 12; polarity 40 to 50. Twelve slots invite the first special slot types.$(br2)$(quote)The Sun is its father, the Moon its mother.$()

pages.title: Rubedo · Reddening
pages.text: Transform Citrinitas Matter into Rubedo Matter. Level 24; polarity 49 to 50; one-time. Twenty-four slots and many special types make this the hardest synthesis.$(br2)$(quote)The force of all forces.$()

pages.title: Before Rubedo
pages.text: Use a Lunar or higher-tier scroll, stock every essence state, and stabilize polarity at 49 or 50 before filling the first slot. At level 24, roughly half the generated slots may be special; plan their resolution order instead of improvising.
